subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: Even though he is old and very frail, Mírza Abú'l-Fadl devotes night and day to the service of the Cause of God and the diffusion of the divine fragrance.
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب ابوالفضائل با نهایت ضعف و پیری شب و روز به خدمت امر الله قائم است
subcodes.subjects: @events in the life and ministry of the Bab, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @conduct in finance and business
